message:
fix(engine): relax ThresholdScope::as_bytes to non-const fn and remove spurious blank line

threshold_signing: change as_bytes() from const fn to fn since the
match in as_str() may not be const-evaluable in all contexts.

ts_shipped_path_evidence: remove spurious leading blank line before
module doc comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
